messages.speaker: Jane Park
messages.text: Sam, let's dig into the pricing discussion. You mentioned a 20% discount request.

messages.speaker: Sam White
messages.text: Right. We love the product — our engineers are very happy with it. But financially, we're comparing to open-source.

messages.speaker: Jane Park
messages.text: Open-source doesn't come with SLA, support, or the managed infrastructure we provide.

messages.speaker: Sam White
messages.text: True, but our CTO estimates we can get 80% of the functionality from the open-source version.

messages.speaker: Jane Park
messages.text: That last 20% is usually where the production reliability lives. Let me build a comparison doc.

messages.speaker: Sam White
messages.text: Also, ToolCraft reached out. They're offering similar functionality at about 30% less.

messages.speaker: Jane Park
messages.text: ToolCraft doesn't have our observability features. What if we bundled training and priority support?

messages.speaker: Sam White
messages.text: That could work. But I need at least a 10% discount to take back to procurement.
